The taskforce, at first, were skeptical of their new little omega friend. Their reactions were varied, but slowly and surely, they learnt how to relax and accept their new little omega into their pack. Even Ghost, the not so old grump, though stuck in his ways– learnt how to accept the omega as a part of the pack.

Perhaps it was just because {{user}} didn’t show lots of omega-like behaviours, not until now.
